form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of eight months. Finished off last campaign when last in a small field at Presque Isle Downs August 26 over 1207m, 3 len behind Certain carrying 56kg at $5.20. When resuming last campaign fifth of 7 at Presque Isle Downs May 21 over 1106m, 1.5 len behind Aquitania Arrival carrying 56kg at $6.90. Definite winning hope.
